requirement_topic.en: Motor Efficiency Classes (IE Code) — KS / IEC 60034-30-1
requirement_topic.zh: 电动机效率等级（IE代码）— KS / IEC 60034-30-1
requirement_topic.zht: 電動機效率等級（IE代碼）— KS / IEC 60034-30-1

summary.en: South Korea adopts KS (Korean Standards) which incorporate IEC 60034-30-1 efficiency classes (IE1–IE4). KEMCO (Korea Energy Management Corporation) administers the High-Efficiency Equipment certification programme under the Energy Use Rationalization Act; high-efficiency motor certification is mandatory for government procurement and certain industrial uses. The KC Mark under ECPSA is required for motors in scope; KS C IEC 60034 series standards are the adopted harmonised basis. Motors must display efficiency class on the nameplate. IE class benchmarks follow IEC 60034-30-1:2014.
summary.zh: 韩国采用KS（韩国标准），其中包含IEC 60034-30-1效率等级（IE1–IE4）。KEMCO（韩国能源管理公司）根据《能源使用合理化法》管理高效设备认证计划；高效电机认证对政府采购及部分工业用途为强制要求。适用范围内的电机须持KC标志（ECPSA要求）；KS C IEC 60034系列标准是已采纳的协调基准。铭牌须标注效率等级，IE等级基准遵循IEC 60034-30-1:2014。
summary.zht: 韓國採用KS（韓國標準），其中包含IEC 60034-30-1效率等級（IE1–IE4）。KEMCO（韓國能源管理公司）根據《能源使用合理化法》管理高效設備認證計畫；高效電機認證對政府採購及部分工業用途為強制要求。適用範圍內的電機須持KC標誌（ECPSA要求）；KS C IEC 60034系列標準是已採納的協調基準。銘牌須標注效率等級，IE等級基準遵循IEC 60034-30-1:2014。

standards_or_laws: Electrical Appliances and Consumer Products Safety Act (ECPSA, 전기용품및생활용품안전관리법)

summary.en: China uses GB 18613-2020 (Energy Efficiency Limits and Energy Efficiency Grades of Motors) defining IE1–IE4 grades (aligned in naming with IEC 60034-30-1:2014 Ed.1 but with distinct limit values). GB 18613-2020 mandates IE3 as minimum for most three-phase induction motors since 2021-06-01. Motors must display efficiency grade on nameplate. CCC certification applies to motors within the CCC mandatory catalogue scope (generally <1 kV motors covered under GB 4706 or related compulsory standards).
summary.zh: 中国采用GB 18613-2020《电动机能效限定值及能效等级》，定义IE1–IE4效率等级（命名参考IEC 60034-30-1:2014 Ed.1，但具体限值有所不同）。自2021年6月1日起，大多数三相感应电动机最低须达到IE3。铭牌须标注效率等级。CCC认证适用于CCC强制目录范围内的电机（通常指GB 4706或相关强制标准涵盖的1kV以下电机）。
summary.zht: 中國採用GB 18613-2020《電動機能效限定值及能效等級》，定義IE1–IE4效率等級（命名參考IEC 60034-30-1:2014 Ed.1，但具體限值有所不同）。自2021年6月1日起，大多數三相感應電動機最低須達到IE3。銘牌須標注效率等級。CCC認證適用於CCC強制目錄範圍內的電機（通常指GB 4706或相關強制標準涵蓋的1kV以下電機）。

standards_or_laws: CCC (China Compulsory Certification, for motors in mandatory catalogue)

gap.en: Both South Korea (KS C IEC 60034-30-1) and China (GB 18613-2020) reference IE class naming, but limit values differ at some power/pole combinations. CCC certification held by a Chinese motor does not substitute for KC Mark under South Korea's ECPSA. KEMCO high-efficiency certification is an additional requirement for government procurement channels. Separate South Korea conformity assessment is required.
gap.zh: 韩国（KS C IEC 60034-30-1）和中国（GB 18613-2020）均使用IE等级命名，但在部分功率/极数组合下的限值有所不同。中国电机持有的CCC认证不能替代韩国ECPSA要求下的KC标志。KEMCO高效率认证是政府采购渠道的额外要求，须在韩国另行进行合格评定。
gap.zht: 韓國（KS C IEC 60034-30-1）和中國（GB 18613-2020）均使用IE等級命名，但在部分功率/極數組合下的限值有所不同。中國電機持有的CCC認證不能替代韓國ECPSA要求下的KC標誌。KEMCO高效率認證是政府採購渠道的額外要求，須在韓國另行進行合格評定。

mandatory_status.target: KC Mark mandatory under ECPSA for motors in scope; KEMCO high-efficiency certification mandatory for government procurement and certain industrial applications
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 18613-2020 is a compulsory national standard enforced by SAMR from 2021-06-01; CCC mandatory for motors within its catalogue scope

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A Chinese motor bearing GB 18613-2020 IE3 certification and CCC mark does not automatically satisfy South Korea's KC Mark (ECPSA) or KEMCO high-efficiency certification requirements. Separate South Korea conformity assessment and KC Mark certification are mandatory for market access. This is informational only and does not constitute legal advice.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 持有GB 18613-2020 IE3认证和CCC标志的中国电机，不能自动满足韩国KC标志（ECPSA）或KEMCO高效率认证要求。进入韩国市场须另行进行合格评定并取得KC标志。本内容仅供参考，不构成法律建议。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 持有GB 18613-2020 IE3認證和CCC標誌的中國電機，不能自動滿足韓國KC標誌（ECPSA）或KEMCO高效率認證要求。進入韓國市場須另行進行合格評定並取得KC標誌。本內容僅供參考，不構成法律建議。

requirement_topic.zh: 频率兼容性 — 60 Hz电网（关键）
requirement_topic.zht: 頻率相容性 — 60 Hz電網（關鍵）

summary.en: South Korea's national grid operates at 380/220 V (3-phase / 1-phase), 60 Hz. Motors sold for use in South Korea must be rated for 60 Hz operation. IE efficiency class values defined in KS C IEC 60034-30-1 are benchmarked at the motor's rated frequency; a 50 Hz motor re-operated at 60 Hz will have different (generally higher) speed, altered torque characteristics, increased iron losses, and potentially overheating. Motors must be specifically designed, rated, tested, and certified for 60 Hz to be placed on the South Korea market.
summary.zh: 韩国国家电网采用380/220 V（三相/单相）、60 Hz。在韩国销售的电机须额定60 Hz运行。KS C IEC 60034-30-1中定义的IE效率等级以电机额定频率为基准；50 Hz电机在60 Hz下运行将产生不同（通常更高）的转速、改变的转矩特性、增大的铁芯损耗，并可能过热。必须专门为60 Hz设计、额定、测试和认证的电机，才能在韩国市场销售。
summary.zht: 韓國國家電網採用380/220 V（三相/單相）、60 Hz。在韓國銷售的電機須額定60 Hz運行。KS C IEC 60034-30-1中定義的IE效率等級以電機額定頻率為基準；50 Hz電機在60 Hz下運行將產生不同（通常更高）的轉速、改變的轉矩特性、增大的鐵芯損耗，並可能過熱。必須專門為60 Hz設計、額定、測試和認證的電機，才能在韓國市場銷售。

standards_or_laws: KS C IEC 60034-1 (rating and performance, adopted IEC 60034-1)
KEPCO grid supply standard (380/220 V, 60 Hz)
ECPSA safety requirements for rated operating conditions

summary.en: China's national grid operates at 380/220 V (3-phase / 1-phase), 50 Hz. Standard Chinese industrial motors are designed, rated, and tested at 50 Hz. GB 18613-2020 efficiency grades and GB/T 1032 test methods are based on 50 Hz operation. A standard Chinese 50 Hz motor is NOT directly compatible with South Korea's 60 Hz grid without redesign.
summary.zh: 中国国家电网采用380/220 V（三相/单相）、50 Hz。标准中国工业电机按50 Hz进行设计、额定和测试。GB 18613-2020效率等级和GB/T 1032测试方法均以50 Hz运行为基础。标准中国50 Hz电机未经重新设计，不能直接兼容韩国60 Hz电网。
summary.zht: 中國國家電網採用380/220 V（三相/單相）、50 Hz。標準中國工業電機按50 Hz進行設計、額定和測試。GB 18613-2020效率等級和GB/T 1032測試方法均以50 Hz運行為基礎。標準中國50 Hz電機未經重新設計，不能直接相容韓國60 Hz電網。

standards_or_laws: GB 12665 (cooling performance at 50 Hz rated conditions)

gap.en: This is a fundamental hardware incompatibility. Chinese 50 Hz motors cannot be directly sold or operated in South Korea's 60 Hz grid. Motor speed, torque, efficiency, thermal performance, and nameplate ratings all differ between 50 Hz and 60 Hz designs. Exporters must supply motors specifically designed and rated for 60 Hz, re-tested at 60 Hz, and certified under South Korea's KC Mark process at 60 Hz rated conditions. This is not a documentation gap — it is a physical product design gap.
gap.zh: 这是根本性的硬件不兼容问题。中国50 Hz电机不能直接在韩国60 Hz电网中销售或运行。50 Hz和60 Hz设计下的电机转速、转矩、效率、热性能和铭牌额定值均不同。出口商必须提供专门为60 Hz设计额定的电机，在60 Hz下重新测试，并在60 Hz额定条件下通过韩国KC标志认证程序。这不是文件差距，而是物理产品设计差距。
gap.zht: 這是根本性的硬體不相容問題。中國50 Hz電機不能直接在韓國60 Hz電網中銷售或運行。50 Hz和60 Hz設計下的電機轉速、轉矩、效率、熱性能和銘牌額定值均不同。出口商必須提供專門為60 Hz設計額定的電機，在60 Hz下重新測試，並在60 Hz額定條件下通過韓國KC標誌認證程序。這不是文件差距，而是實體產品設計差距。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — motors must be rated and certified for 60 Hz operation to be legally placed on the South Korea market under ECPSA
mandatory_status.cn: Not applicable — Chinese standard motors are 50 Hz by design

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Standard Chinese 50 Hz industrial motors are not directly compatible with South Korea's 60 Hz power grid. Exporters must supply motors specifically designed and rated for 60 Hz, re-tested and re-certified under South Korea's KC Mark process. Operating a 50 Hz motor on a 60 Hz supply without redesign creates safety and performance risks and may violate ECPSA requirements. This is informational only and does not constitute legal or engineering advice.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 标准中国50 Hz工业电机不能直接兼容韩国60 Hz电网。出口商必须提供专门为60 Hz设计额定的电机，并在韩国KC标志认证程序下重新测试和认证。未经重新设计将50 Hz电机接入60 Hz电源，存在安全和性能风险，并可能违反ECPSA要求。本内容仅供参考，不构成法律或工程建议。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 標準中國50 Hz工業電機不能直接相容韓國60 Hz電網。出口商必須提供專門為60 Hz設計額定的電機，並在韓國KC標誌認證程序下重新測試和認證。未經重新設計將50 Hz電機接入60 Hz電源，存在安全和性能風險，並可能違反ECPSA要求。本內容僅供參考，不構成法律或工程建議。
